commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 2. "Praise the Lord with harp:" praise the Lord, presenting unto Him your bodies a living sacrifice. "Sing unto Him with the psaltery for ten strings" (ver. 2): let your members be servants to the love of God, and of your neighbour, in which are kept both the three and the seven commandments.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Psaltery. Hebrew nebel, (Haydock) which does not resemble the modern psaltery. (Calmet)
We must carefully observe mortification, and the decalogue. (Worthington)
